description_long: This is a lever-action rifle with a classic design, featuring a wooden stock and forearm with visible grain and wear, suggesting frequent use or age. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, with a blued or matte finish, and the lever loop is prominent beneath the receiver. The rifle has a fixed iron sight at the front and a rear sight mounted on the barrel. The magazine appears to be a detachable box type, located just ahead of the trigger guard. Brass or gold-toned accents are visible near the receiver and barrel junction, adding a touch of contrast to the otherwise utilitarian appearance.
description: A lever-action rifle with a wooden stock, dark metal barrel, and brass accents, featuring iron sights and a detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, lever, and brass accents near the receiver.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile of the barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, lever, and the magazine area with visible wear.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the lever loop, trigger guard, and the underside of the wooden stock.
